odoo-brl.notes: BRL engine: chunked 4-way classify (double-profile check_module_exists) + deterministic cost (cost-config.json) + RTM deliverables. Phase 0 bootstrap uses profile_inspect(summary) for profile composition; Phase C uses impact_analysis to ground Extension-M/L tier in real blast radius. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-addon-diff.notes: CE/EE/distribution diff is profile-scoped: pin profile (set_active_profile) + profile_inspect(repos) to know each profile's real repo coverage; entity_lookup attributes a field's source module (CE vs EE). min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-campaign-plan.notes: Standalone-first. OSM tools optional for feature claim grounding only; profile_inspect verifies a 'competitive displacement' angle against the real platform inventory.

odoo-capability-proof.notes: module_inspect(summary) adds architecture scope (N models/views) to the proof package beyond field-level evidence.

odoo-competitive-brief.notes: Standalone-first. profile_inspect turns the capability matrix's 'your platform' column from training-data assertion into indexed fact. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-content-draft.notes: Standalone-first. OSM tools optional for grounding feature claims in content.

odoo-customization-inventory.notes: profile_inspect(modules) enumerates the profile's modules in one call (Round 0); module_inspect(dependencies) + find_deprecated_usage ground upgrade-risk in real dependency graph + deprecated-API scan. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-deal-followup.notes: Standalone-first. check_module_exists optional — only when user requests feature fact-check.

odoo-demo-recorder.notes: Standalone-first. OSM optional — only to plan the demo click path; video capture is browser-MCP side. set_active_version pins the target version so view/URL paths are not resolved against latest-indexed.

odoo-deploy-checklist.notes: Domain 5 grounds CLI flags for the target version via cli_help (was instructed in SKILL.md but undeclared).

odoo-deprecation-audit.notes: set_active_profile scopes find_deprecated_usage(profile_name) to the customer's modules instead of default Odoo CE scope.

odoo-discovery-summarize.notes: Standalone-first. profile_inspect(modules) verifies profile-owned modules in one call (Round 3.5), upgrading Confidence-Low rows. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-feature-highlights.notes: module_inspect(summary) gives concrete architecture numbers (N models/views) for marketing copy.

odoo-frontend-coding.notes: Slim SKILL.md of an agent+skill bundle; dispatches to the odoo-frontend-coder agent. Covers all supported Odoo frontend JS versions. resolve_stylesheet + find_style_override (0.7.0) declared to match the agent (required for any styling/theme work).

odoo-gap-analysis.notes: module_inspect distinguishes Configuration vs Extension via view/JS inventory, not just the field list.

odoo-objection-handler.notes: module_inspect(summary) strengthens the ACA Counter table with module scope numbers.

odoo-onboard.notes: After profile selection, profile_inspect(modules) records the real module inventory into .odoo-ai/context.md so downstream skills need not re-derive it. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

odoo-override-finder.notes: lookup_core_api + api_version_diff verify a method's API stability / signature change from the index; find_examples grounds the override template in real indexed code instead of training memory.

odoo-risk-overview.notes: profile_inspect(modules) auto-enumerates the in-scope modules in Round 0. min_server 0.13.1 for profile_inspect.

intake.notes: Pure text routing and brainstorm — no MCP tool calls. Tool names mentioned in routing table discriminators are references to OTHER skills' tools, not invocations by intake itself.

wave.notes: Depth-0 git-wave orchestration skill — no MCP tools; spawns WI subagents over worktrees + cherry-pick + /code-review + squash. Outputs to .odoo-ai/wave/ (gitignored).

odoo-ui-debug.notes: Runtime UI debugging. Browser MCP (chrome-devtools) drives the live instance; OSM localizes the cause. suggest_pattern (used in body, was undeclared) infers JS/OWL override location; set_active_version pins the target so odoo_version='auto' calls are not resolved against latest-indexed.

odoo-ui-reviewer.notes: Rendered-UI review (aesthetics/functional/stability/a11y/performance). Browser MCP (chrome-devtools) captures the live screen; OSM grounds findings in code. Tool list synced to companion agent agents/odoo-ui-reviewer.md.

odoo-version-diff.notes: find_examples grounds Added-API descriptions in real indexed usage.

odoo-visual-regression.notes: Screenshot baseline + diff between two states/builds. OSM scopes the comparison via blast radius; browser MCP captures and diffs. resolve_stylesheet adds the @import-chain blast radius; set_active_version pins the target version.

odoo-support-triage.notes: Composition skill — no MCP tools called directly. NL-dispatches to odoo-ui-debug (bug path) and odoo-feature-check (feature-request path) via description-match. All outputs to .odoo-ai/support/ (gitignored, confidentiality-safe).

odoo-qa-suite.notes: Phase 1 grounds test mechanics (test class, tag syntax, --test-enable/--test-tags) via OSM set_active_version + cli_help for the target version; Phase 2 NL-dispatches to odoo-deploy-checklist. Outputs to .odoo-ai/qa/.

odoo-coder.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-coder slim SKILL.md. Tool list from agents/odoo-coder.md frontmatter. find_override_point grounds super() position for method overrides; module_inspect gives whole-module picture.

odoo-code-reviewer.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-code-reviewer slim SKILL.md. Tool list from agents/odoo-code-reviewer.md frontmatter. find_examples gives evidence code for the Suggested-Pattern section; api_version_diff for cross-version review; find_style_override + resolve_stylesheet for the SCSS review path.

odoo-ui-reviewer.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-ui-reviewer slim SKILL.md. Tool list from agents/odoo-ui-reviewer.md frontmatter. set_active_version pins the version (was discovered via list_available_versions but never pinned); api_version_diff explains version-specific token changes in the design-system lens.

odoo-frontend-coder.notes: Agent bundle — companion to odoo-frontend-coding slim SKILL.md. Tool list from agents/odoo-frontend-coder.md frontmatter. entity_lookup verifies an OWL component method exists before patch().

orchestration._doc: SSOT (single source of truth) for orchestration metadata of every skills/<dir>. Consumed by gen_surface.py -> docs/reference/ORCHESTRATION-MAP.md + orchestration-digest.txt, and validated by check_orchestration.py. spawn_class: leaf (runs inline) | orchestrator-nl (chains other skills via natural-language dispatch, no Agent-tool spawn) | spawner-agent (dispatch a named agent at depth0->1) | spawner-wave (depth0->1->2 worktree fan-out). depth_policy: any-depth | depth0-only (must only be invoked from the main agent, never from a subagent). stack: backend | frontend | fullstack | none (drives backend<->frontend routing). instance_touching: true when the skill emits odoo-bin / builds or updates an instance (must ground CLI via OSM cli_help per target version).

spawns: (Phase R: ≤2 read-only recon agents — Explore or specialist in read-only mode; no writes, no further spawn)
